div.div: Architecture note: Solid line = association constructor; filled diamond = ownership by MyPetaApp; dashed line with open arrow = module dependency. The application uses supabase-js and pg.Pool directly, not an ORM. public.job_listings is expected by an external Grep API mode but is absent from the live schema; public.scraped_jobs is the available source available Supa Grep.
